prompt: Draft a 90-minute codelab for our GDG workshop titled 'Build a Chrome Extension with Gemini API'. The extension summarizes the current web page when the user clicks the toolbar icon. Audience already knows JavaScript but hasn't built a Chrome extension before. Cover manifest v3, content scripts, calling the Gemini API from the extension, and packaging. Save the markdown as `gemini-chrome-extension-workshop/claat.md`.
assertions: No `## Step N:` prefix in step headers
All fenced code blocks have language tags
